headline: A Look At Brown & Brown (BRO) Valuation After Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Beat
summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) is back in focus after its first quarter 2026 earnings report showed revenue of US$1.9b, higher net income, and earnings per share above Wall Street estimates, along with a reaffirmed quarterly dividend. See our latest analysis for Brown & Brown. Despite the stronger first quarter report and confirmed dividend, recent trading has been weak. headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones Roars As Industrials Rescue Wall Street From Meta-Led Tech Slide
summary: A sharp rotation gripped Wall Street at midday Thursday as blue-chip industrials and healthcare powered the Dow higher, masking a savage selloff in mega-cap tech after Meta and Microsoft warned on AI infrastructure spending.
